skill.name: kvkk-denetim
skill.description: Türkiye KVKK compliance helper for reviewing privacy notices, consent text, data subject rights, retention statements, and cross-border transfer language.
skill.summary: Review Turkish KVKK notices and consent text for common compliance gaps.
skill.author: cesareth

security_audit.summary: AI review dismissed the static weak-cryptography and backtick-execution alerts as false positives based on the cited lines. No prompt injection, network access, command execution, or credential exfiltration was found. The remaining low risk is a community Python helper that reads a user-selected local file for KVKK analysis.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Weak Cryptography Static Matches
low_findings.description: Static weak-cryptography alerts are false positives. The cited lines contain Turkish legal text, regex rule setup, or argparse description text, not hash functions, cipher selection, or password storage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited code and Markdown do not call cryptographic APIs or name weak algorithms. The matches are caused by legal wording and Markdown content.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Markdown Backtick Command Matches
low_findings.description: Static backtick execution alerts are false positives. The cited SKILL.md ranges are fenced Markdown examples for legal templates and report output, not Ruby or shell execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The lines are visibly Markdown code fences containing plain template text. There is no command interpreter, subprocess call, or shell syntax execution path.

low_findings.title: User-selected Local File Read in Helper Script
low_findings.description: The Python helper can read a local file path supplied through the --file option. This supports the skill purpose, but users should run it only on documents they intend to analyze because file contents are printed in an audit workflow.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file read is explicit and user controlled, with no hidden path selection or network transfer. It is a low-risk capability rather than malicious behavior.

content.user_title: Audit KVKK Compliance for Turkish Notices
content.value_statement: Turkish privacy notices and consent forms often miss required KVKK disclosures. This skill reviews the text, flags common gaps, and drafts practical remediation guidance.
actual_capabilities: Reviews Turkish privacy notices for KVKK Article 10 disclosure elements.
Checks whether data subject rights under Article 11 are mentioned.
Identifies risky consent wording such as preselected consent or consent by use.
Flags possible special category data and cross-border transfer language.
Produces a structured KVKK compliance report with findings and recommendations.
Provides reusable Turkish templates for privacy notices and explicit consent text.
limitations: It is an informational aid and does not replace legal advice from a Turkish lawyer.
Penalty amounts and legal thresholds may change after the skill content date.
The helper script uses keyword checks and cannot prove full legal compliance.
It does not submit VERBIS filings or communicate with official KVKK systems.

use_cases.title: Review a Startup Privacy Notice
use_cases.description: Check a new Turkish web application privacy notice before launch and list missing KVKK disclosures.

use_cases.title: Prepare Consent Text for Marketing
use_cases.description: Draft clear explicit consent wording for email marketing or sensitive processing scenarios.

use_cases.title: Screen Client Documents
use_cases.description: Create an initial issue list before a lawyer performs final compliance review.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Notice Check
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner review of a short privacy notice
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this Turkish privacy notice for KVKK basics. List missing items, risky wording, and simple fixes.

prompt_templates.title: Consent Form Draft
prompt_templates.scenario: Create a plain explicit consent form
prompt_templates.prompt: Draft a KVKK explicit consent text for this processing activity. Include purpose, data types, withdrawal rights, and signature fields.

prompt_templates.title: Full Compliance Report
prompt_templates.scenario: Analyze a complete policy or application workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Prepare a KVKK compliance report for this document. Score it, separate critical and important findings, and recommend remediation steps.

prompt_templates.title: Cross-border Transfer Review
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced review of vendors and cloud services
prompt_templates.prompt: Assess this data flow for KVKK cross-border transfer risk. Identify overseas vendors, missing disclosures, and required legal safeguards.

output_examples.input: A privacy notice says customer data may be shared with business partners without naming purposes or recipient groups.
output: The report flags unclear third-party transfer language under KVKK Article 8.
It recommends naming recipient groups, transfer purposes, and legal basis in the notice.
It marks the issue as important because users cannot understand who receives their data.

output_examples.input: A consent form uses a preselected checkbox for marketing emails.
output: The review identifies the consent method as invalid because consent must be freely given and explicit.
It recommends an unchecked, separate consent action with clear withdrawal instructions.

output_examples.input: A mobile app policy mentions health data and cloud hosting outside Turkey.
output: The output highlights special category data and cross-border transfer risks.
It recommends stronger safeguards, explicit disclosures, and lawyer review before deployment.

best_practices: Provide the full Turkish notice text and describe the real data processing activity.
Separate factual compliance gaps from legal judgment that needs professional review.
Update penalty references and official thresholds before relying on financial impact estimates.
anti_patterns: Do not treat the generated report as binding legal advice.
Do not reuse generic GDPR text without adapting it to KVKK terminology and rights.
Do not analyze confidential personal data unless you have permission and a secure workflow.

faq.question: Does this skill provide legal advice?
faq.answer: No. It provides informational review support. A qualified Turkish lawyer should approve final documents.

faq.question: Can it draft a KVKK aydınlatma metni?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes guidance and templates for Turkish privacy notice drafting.

faq.question: Can it review explicit consent forms?
faq.answer: Yes. It can check consent language for clarity, voluntariness, and withdrawal information.

faq.question: Does it connect to KVKK or VERBIS systems?
faq.answer: No. It does not access official systems or submit regulatory filings.

faq.question: What documents work best?
faq.answer: Privacy notices, consent forms, data processing summaries, and application data-flow descriptions work best.

faq.question: Is it useful outside Turkey?
faq.answer: It is designed for Turkish KVKK review. Other jurisdictions need separate legal analysis.
